dict.string: Sphere reads today's events to show your agenda and give your morning brief context. Nothing is shared or uploaded.
Sphere can import names and birthdays from your contacts to set up your Relationships sphere. Nothing is shared or uploaded.
Unlock Sphere with Face ID so your health, finance, and journal data stays private.
Sphere reads your steps, heart rate, sleep, energy, HRV, cycle, workouts, and weight from Apple Health so your Health agent can work with real data.
Sphere can save the weight, water, workouts, and mindful minutes you log back to Apple Health, so your data stays in one place.
Sphere uses your location to show local weather on the Home tab.
Dictate messages to your agents by voice.
Attach photos to your agent conversations.
Sphere reads your open reminders to bring them into your Career tasks. Nothing is shared or uploaded.
Transcribe your voice into chat messages, on-device where possible.
